description: Section A draft lock requires exclusive write access
Section B draft lock requires exclusive write access
Section C draft lock requires exclusive write access
Section D draft lock requires exclusive write access
FIGURE_REPOSITORY requires exclusive update access (mutex lock)
Reference DATABASE requires exclusive update access (mutex lock)
DATA_ANALYST needs raw data from RESEARCHER_A, RESEARCHER_B, RESEARCHER_C, RESEARCHER_D before producing figures
RESEARCHER_A, RESEARCHER_B, RESEARCHER_C, RESEARCHER_D may need figures from DATA_ANALYST before finalizing sections (circular dependency)
Researchers may cross-reference other sections, creating read-after-write dependencies
REVIEWER can only review complete section drafts
EDITOR_IN_CHIEF can only make final decisions after REVIEWER has reviewed a section
REVIEWER decides major revisions (requires re-review) vs minor revisions vs accept
EDITOR_IN_CHIEF resolves cross-section conflicts and makes final editorial decisions
Write section -> REVIEWER reviews -> EDITOR_IN_CHIEF decides -> finalize (per section pipeline)
Major revisions require re-review by REVIEWER; minor revisions do not
DATA_ANALYST needs FIGURE_REPOSITORY lock to update figures and section locks to insert them
Circular dependency: researcher waits for DATA_ANALYST figures, DATA_ANALYST waits for researcher raw data
Cross-reference deadlock: two researchers each need to read the other's section while holding their own section lock
